functions.name: calc_auto_padding
params:
{
  padding,
  default_padding,
  y_axis = {},
  y2_axis = {},
  label_gap = LABEL_GAP_DEFAULT,
}

callGraph.callee:
Object.keys(ticks_option)
      .map(Number)
      .filter((val) => Number.isFinite(val) && val >= domain_min && val <= domain_max)
      .sort
